title: Super Charlie (KIFF 2026)
synopsis: Wille (10) has always dreamed of becoming a superhero and fighting crime alongside his father, who is a policeman. However, his dream is shattered when his baby brother Charlie is born. Not only does Charlie get all the attention, but Wille also discovers that Charlie has superpowers. When a supervillain and a deranged scientist enact their evil plan, Wille and Charlie need to put their differences aside and work as a team. But can an infant and his envious brother save the city?

synopsis_lang.en: Wille (10) has always dreamed of becoming a superhero and fighting crime alongside his father, who is a policeman. However, his dream is shattered when his baby brother Charlie is born. Not only does Charlie get all the attention, but Wille also discovers that Charlie has superpowers. When a supervillain and a deranged scientist enact their evil plan, Wille and Charlie need to put their differences aside and work as a team. But can an infant and his envious brother save the city?
synopsis_lang.zh_hk: 10 歲的威利有個超級夢想：就是要跟警察爸爸一起打擊犯罪、拯救世界！沒想到，家裡突然來了一個「小麻煩」— 弟弟查理。查理不只搶走了大家的目光，威利還發現一個驚人大秘密：這個還在穿尿片的寶寶，竟然擁有神級超能力！當邪惡的大壞蛋和瘋狂科學家現身搗亂，愛吃醋的小哥哥加上超能小寶寶，真的能聯手拯救城市嗎？

subtitle: Chinese
